title: Ord Klina

'''Ord Klina'''<ref name="EGTW" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord}} states that the term "[[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]]" and the abbreviation "Ord" applied to certain [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].</ref> located in the [[Ord Klina system/Legends|Ord Klina system]], a part of the [[Klina sector/Legends|Klina sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Slice" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Ord Klina served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between approximately [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]], despite it being located outside the borders of Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. When the Republic launched the [[Thirty-Fourth Pius Dea Crusade]] against the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]] in [[11,057 BBY]], [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic forces]] moved from Ord Klina toward [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="EGTW" />

At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> [[Tyrimm Wyln]], a [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Farmer/Legends|farmer]] and the mate of [[bladesmith]] [[Mlatar Thon Gra]], used the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] she and her [[Gender/Legends|sisters]] had saved from managing a herd of [[bist]]s on her [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]] to tour a portion of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that included Ord Klina.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Klina was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Klina [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square S-13.<ref name="TEA" />
